title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology examines six security dangers posed by autonomous AI agents through the OpenClaw case study. The discussion covers vulnerabilities including prompt injection and credential exposure, linking them to agent autonomy, tool access, and memory systems.
